|desc={{p|Venipede}} is the first Pokémon that is Burgh is known to possess. It is commonly seen on sitting on Burgh's shoulder.

None of Venipede's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Whirlipede 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Burgh
|pkmn=Whirlipede
|type1=Bug
|type2=Poison
|img=Burgh Whirlipede Adventures.png
|epnum=PS475
|epname=The Mystery of the Missing Fossil
|desc={{p|Whirlipede}} was the second Pokémon that Burgh is seen to own. It was used to battle [[Gorm]] of Team Plasma to retrieve the stolen Dragon Skeleton. Later it was used in the Gym Battle against Black's [[Brav]], but was easily defeated by an {{m|Air Slash}}. At Nacrene City, it was used to combat the Shadow Triad, but was defeated.

Whirlipede's only known move is {{m|Pursuit}}, and its Ability is {{a|Poison Point}}.}}

{{anchor|Dwebble 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Burgh
|pkmn=Dwebble
|type1=Bug
|type2=Rock
|img=Burgh Dwebble Adventures.png
|epnum=PS478
|epname=Big City Battles
|desc={{p|Dwebble}} was the third Pokémon that Burgh is seen to own. It was used in the Gym battle against Black's Brav and easily defeated him. Later, it was switched out when Black sent out his [[Tula]] for Leavanny. After Leavanny was defeated, Dwebble faced Black's Tep in battle and was defeated once the {{p|Tepig}} evolved into a {{p|Pignite}} and redirected its attack back at it.

Dwebble's only known move is {{m|Smack Down}}, and its Ability is {{a|Sturdy}}.}}

{{anchor|Leavanny 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Burgh
|pkmn=Leavanny
|type1=Bug
|type2=Grass
|img=Burgh Leavanny Adventures.png
|epnum=PS478
|epname=Big City Battles
|desc={{p|Leavanny}} was the fourth Pokémon that Burgh is seen to own. It was used in the Gym Battle against Black's where it was seen being switched in to battle Black's Tula and tied with it.

It was later seen in ''[[PS522|The Battle]]'', where it participated in the battle against the [[Seven Sages]].

Leavanny's known moves are {{m|String Shot}}, {{m|Leaf Blade}}, and {{m|Struggle Bug}}{{tt|*|mentioned only}}, and its Ability is {{a|Chlorophyll}}.}}
